--- same.sql
SAME(a, b, c)

--- AST
&ast.CallExpr{
  Rparen: 12,
  Func:   &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NameEnd: 4,
        Name:    "SAME",
      },
    },
  },
  Args: []ast.Arg{
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 5,
        NameEnd: 6,
        Name:    "a",
      },
    },
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 8,
        NameEnd: 9,
        Name:    "b",
      },
    },
    &ast.ExprArg{
      Expr: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 11,
        NameEnd: 12,
        Name:    "c",
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SAME(a, b, c)
